text: Reaction: After a duel resolves, bow this stronghold and choose a character you control that was involved in the duel - honor that character.
name: Kyūden Kakita

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, choose a character that is not honored – bow that character.
flavorText: The Daidoji learned long ago that the marketplace was merely another battlefield for them to master.
name: Market of Kaze-no-Kami

text: Increase your deckbuilding influence value by 8. You may only spend influence on [clan-crane] clan cards.
name: Support of the Crane

text: Each player draws 2 fewer cards from honor bids during the draw phase (to a minimum of 1).
flavorText: "Remember that with you, there are no samurai. There are only men and women in need of a compassionate friend and a listening ear."
name: Iwasaki Pupil

text: Action: Choose an opponent - you and that opponent each draw a card.
flavorText:
"The children would love to see you again."
"As long as our lords maintain peace, I see no reason that could not happen."
name: Beloved Advisor

text: This character gets +2[conflict-political] while it is involved in a duel.
flavorText: "They will forget your name when they hear of mine."
name: Kakita Favorite

text: This character cannot receive dishonored status tokens.
flavorText: No two of her brushes are the same, each carved with a distinct grace that suits the kami dwelling within.
name: Maker of Keepsakes

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice - resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's loser cannot declare [conflict-military] conflicts this phase.
name: Kakita Yuri

text: Reaction: After you play a [clan-crane] character, choose an opponent's character with equal or lower printed cost - that character cannot be declared as an attacker or defender this round.
flavorText: "A red sun in the hour of the Hare. Not a bird in the sky. Do you not see that the battle is already won?"
name: Asahina Takamori

text: Reaction: After you play this character, choose a Courtier in your provinces – put that character into play. If that character has a printed cost of 2 or lower, put 1 fate on it.
flavorText: Crane generosity often end conflicts before a single blow is struck.
name: Benevolent Host

text: While this character is honored, you may play each character in your provinces as if it were in your hand. Errata from the Imperial Law (2020-01-06)
flavorText: "I'm proud of what Uji-sama has done with the Iron Cranes. But do they have the will to bear such crimson stains upon their white wings?" - Bayushi Shoju
name: Daidoji Uji

text: No attachments. Reaction: After your opponent plays a card during a conflict in which this character is participating, if you are more honorable than that opponent - draw 1 card. (Unlimited.)
name: Winter Court Hosts

text: Reaction: After you win a duel - place 1 honor token on this holding. Then, you may sacrifice this holding to gain honor equal to the number of honor tokens on this holding. (Limit 3 times per round.)
name: Distinguished Dōjō

text: Interrupt: When this character leaves play, choose up to one character controlled by each player - discard each status token from each of those characters.
flavorText: When Yasuki Fuzake discovered the Round Ear Nezumi, his gentle stoicism made him strong new allies. His sensei, fierce and stubborn, was not so fortunate.
name: Yasuki Fuzake

text: Reaction: After honor dials are revealed, if your honor bid is equal to an opponent's - move 1 fate from that opponent's fate pool to an unclaimed ring.
flavorText: Rumors tell of a master duelist who has hung up his sword, unwilling to draw steel until he can find his disgraced father and complete the challenge cut short by circumstance.
name: Kitsuki Jusai

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a participating Courtier character - if that character has no fate on it, discard it. Otherwise, remove 1 fate from it.
flavorText: "I am sworn to the Lion. My former husband's acts with the Crane army are non of your concern."
name: Akodo Makoto

text: Card abilities triggered by your opponents cannot cause cards to be discarded from your hand.
flavorText: When reading and writing proved impossible to her, the daughter of the Chukan daimyō set out to learn from the traditions kept alive by the people of Rokugan.
name: Chukan Nobue

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a status token on another character in play - move that token to this character.
flavorText: "I was honored to stand as your champion, Daisetsu-sama."
name: Bayushi Dairu

text: Reaction: After another character you control is honored - honor this character.
flavorText: "We rule the Sea of the Sun Goddess by the skill of our sailors and the excellence of our quivers."
name: Armament Artisan

text:
Play only during a [conflict-political] conflict, in which you count more current [conflict-political] than your opponent, and only on a participating character.
Attached character cannot trigger its abilities.
name: Political Sanction

text: Attach to a character you control. Restricted. Reaction: After attached character wins a [conflict-political] conflict, sacrifice this attachment - your opponent chooses and discards 2 cards from his or her hand.
name: Letter from the Daimyō

text: Limited. (No more than one limited card can be played by each player each round.) Action: Name a card. Until the end of the phase, each opponent cannot play cards from his or her hand with that name.
name: Gossip

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, discard an honored status token from a participating (friendly) character and choose a participating character your opponent controls - bow that character. Errata from RRG v9
flavorText: The Crane lives by the ceaseless vigilance of the Defenders of the Doji.
name: The Spear Rushes Forth

text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice - resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's winner may declare an additional [conflict-political] conflict this phase. (Max 1 per round.)
flavorText: "Why don't we discuss this in private?"
name: Courteous Scheming

text: Action: Honor each character.
flavorText:
Wisteria blooms 
Prayers fly on colored streamers 
Armies march to war
name: Festival for the Fortunes

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose an honored character - move that character to the conflict.
flavorText: "I will forge my own destiny, and I do not need some treaty to do it."
name: Shinjo Haruko

text: Restricted. Action: During a conflict, if this card is in your hand, reveal it and initiate a [conflict-military] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice - resolve the duel. Put this card into play attached to the duel's winner, if able. Otherwise, discard it.
name: Daimyō's Gunbai

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a participating character you control - move that character home.
flavorText: "The astute warrior who lives reaps three victories over the foolish warrior who dies." - Book of Sun Tao
name: Retreat
